# BP-158 negative: the gRPC-shaped method returns a status error
lang: go
file: BP-158-safe.go
variant: grpc
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"google.golang.org/grpc/codes"
	"google.golang.org/grpc/status"
)

type Request struct{}
type Response struct{}
type server struct{}

func (s *server) Get(ctx context.Context, req *Request) (*Response, error) {
	resp, err := loadResponse(req)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, status.Errorf(codes.Internal, "load response: %v", err)
	}
	return resp, nil
}

func loadResponse(*Request) (*Response, error) { return nil, nil }
